name: vortos/vortos-observability
description: Telemetry destination seam (OTel collector + off-host sinks, disk-buffered) and publishable observability templates

suggest.vortos/vortos-deploy: Optional: links deploy/rollback domain events into the tamper-evident audit ledger and deploy markers (Block 16). Observability never depends on Deploy at build time — the integration is guarded by class_exists().
suggest.doctrine/dbal: Required for the default DBAL-backed deploy audit ledger read model.
suggest.vortos/vortos-persistence-mongo: Optional: store the deploy audit ledger read model in MongoDB instead of the default relational (DBAL) table.
